title: Share Button Popup Modal with Social and Internal Sharing Options
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to click a Share button in the top toolbar and see a popup modal with options to share the app on social media or invite colleagues within my organization, so that I can spread the word and onboard teammates easily.
description:
The existing Share icon in the top toolbar is being replaced with a two-column popup modal that serves dual purposes.

## Left Column — Social Sharing
- Heading: "Share DataTools with your Network"
- Social sharing buttons for external platforms (initially planned via ShareThis, later replaced with local scripts due to CSP header conflicts)
- Fallback messaging: "Not Happy Enough to Share?" with a link to schedule a feedback meeting (tracked via UTM parameters)

## Right Column — Internal Sharing
- Heading: "Share Access with other users in your organization"
- Button linking to the My Accounts / Sharing and Permissions page (`/myaccounts`)

## Implementation Notes
- The ShareThis third-party script was blocked by Content Security Policy (CSP) headers because it injects inline styles. The solution pivoted to locally hosted social sharing icons.
- Open Graph meta tags are retained in the HTML `<head>` for link previews when URLs are shared.
- UTM tracking parameters are appended to the "Schedule a Meeting" link for analytics.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking the Share icon in the top toolbar opens a two-column popup modal
Left column displays social sharing options with locally hosted icons
Left column includes a 'Not Happy Enough to Share?' section with a 'Schedule a Meeting' link
Schedule a Meeting link includes UTM tracking parameters
Right column displays 'Share Access with other users in your organization' heading
Right column button navigates to the My Accounts sharing and permissions page
Open Graph meta tags are present in the HTML head for link preview support
Modal works correctly with CSP headers enabled
ux_changes: Replaces the Share icon action with a two-column popup modal. Left column provides social sharing buttons and a feedback CTA. Right column links to internal user sharing and permissions. Heading sizes adjusted to H5 for visual consistency.
implementation_notes: ShareThis third-party script was initially planned but blocked by CSP headers due to inline style injection. Pivoted to locally hosted social sharing icons. Open Graph meta tags retained in HTML head for link previews. UTM parameters added to Schedule a Meeting link for campaign tracking. Heading sizes reduced from H3 to H5 for better visual fit.
comment_summary: Developer discovered ShareThis was blocked by CSP headers. Product owner pivoted to a local script solution while keeping OG meta tags. Layout was iterated — heading sizes reduced, copy text refined, right pane linked to /myaccounts. Social icon research deferred to a follow-up enhancement ticket.
